## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `docker compose exec app composer qa` (format, tests, lint) locally
- [ ] I kept UI copy in English
- [ ] I did not introduce organization-specific names, credentials or data
- [ ] I kept Domain framework-agnostic and business logic out of controllers
- [ ] I updated documentation (README/briefing) if behavior changed
